comment: This is an example configuration file. Copy this to api-keys.json and fill in your actual API credentials.
warning: NEVER commit api-keys.json to version control! It contains sensitive credentials.

mock.description: Mock service requires no configuration - works out of the box for testing

alpaca.description: Alpaca Markets - Commission-free US stock trading
notes: usePaper: true = paper trading (recommended for testing)
usePaper: false = live trading with real money
Recommended: Start with small amounts for testing
testnet: true = testnet trading (recommended for testing)
testnet: false = live trading with real money
useLive: false = practice account (recommended for testing)
useLive: true = live trading with real money

configuration_instructions.step1: Copy this file to 'api-keys.json' in the same directory
configuration_instructions.step2: Set 'enabled: true' for services you want to use
configuration_instructions.step3: Replace placeholder values with your actual API credentials
configuration_instructions.step4: IMPORTANT: Never commit api-keys.json to version control
configuration_instructions.step5: The .gitignore file is already configured to ignore api-keys.json
security: Keep your API keys secure and never share them
Use paper/test accounts before trading with real money
Review API key permissions - only grant what's necessary
Regularly rotate your API keys for security
